title: The Bandit Threat
description: A band of outlaws has been spotted near the village, growing bolder each day. They demand tribute or threaten to raid.

title: The Spreading Sickness
description: A mysterious illness begins affecting villagers. The apothecary struggles to find a cure while fear and blame spread faster than the disease.

title: The Dark Ritual
description: Strange symbols appear in the forest. Animals behave oddly. Someone — or something — is performing forbidden rituals near the village.

title: The Merchant Prince
description: A wealthy merchant caravan arrives, bringing prosperity but also greed, jealousy, and dangerous deals. Not everyone benefits equally.

title: Blood Feud
description: An old grudge between two village families erupts into open hostility. Others must choose sides or try to mediate before blood is spilled.

title: The Lost Child
description: A child from the village vanishes. The community rallies to search, but dark rumors swirl about what — or who — took them.

title: Harvest Festival
description: The annual harvest celebration brings joy, competitions, romance, and old rivalries to the surface. A time of revelry — and vulnerability.

title: The Deserter
description: A wounded soldier arrives claiming to have deserted a losing war. Soon, military scouts come looking for him. The village must decide: shelter him or hand him over.
